subcodes.first_line: O servant of the sacred Threshold! Two letters have reached Me from thee. As time permitteth not a detailed reply, I write briefly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس دو نامه از شما رسید مجال جواب نه لهذا باختصار پرداختم
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @entry by troops
